message:
fix(key_management): prevent slot ID collision after revocation

Previously, new slots were assigned IDs based on key_slots.len(), which
could cause collisions after revoking a slot. For example:
- Start with slot 0
- Add slot 1 (len=1, new id=1) ✓
- Revoke slot 0 → now have [slot 1], len=1
- Add new slot → len=1, new id=1 ← COLLISION!

Now uses max(existing_ids) + 1 to ensure unique IDs even with gaps.

Added test_key_add_after_revoke_no_id_collision to verify the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
